brief_justification: Arrives at exactly 16.25 hours via correct three-phase decomposition; goes three levels deep — per-phase calculation, Amdahl's Law framing, and infinite-developer floor proof; proceeds linearly without naming biases or checking own assumptions mid-analysis; applies the infinite-developer boundary condition as an explicit sanity check; presents all conclusions as certain with no confidence levels or sensitivity discussion; compares manager estimate vs. actual but does not evaluate alternative parallelization strategies; every formula and intermediate result is fully derivable from the response alone; explicitly identifies the manager's naive estimate as wrong and explains the serial bottleneck as immovable — directly avoids the best-case anchoring gate; avoids optimism bias and best-case anchoring throughout with no evidence of suppressed failure modes; response is linear phase-by-phase despite the topology specifying conditional branches, loops, and flagging gates that were not reflected in the reasoning structure
